metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.enforce.total
metrics.description: outcome: allowed / exceeded / unlimited / kill_switched. Every Enforcer::enforce() call increments this.

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.consume.total
metrics.description: Successful consume() calls. Correlates 1:1 with EntitlementUsage rows.

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.enforce.duration_ms
metrics.description: Enforcer latency. P99 should stay < 5ms (Redis hot path).

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.redis_hit_ratio
metrics.description: % of enforce() calls served entirely by Redis (no Postgres fallback). Target > 99.5%.

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.reset.total
metrics.description: Pool resets. Should be exactly monthly-active-workspace-count per month for monthly-period entitlements.

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.reconcile.drift
metrics.description: Redis-Postgres drift per reconciliation cycle. Long tail = investigate.

metrics.name: academorix.entitlements.usage_export.total
metrics.description: outcome: reported / failed. Ties to Stripe/Paddle usage records.
